overview.Name: Exelixis Inc
overview.Description: Exelixis, Inc., an oncology-focused biotechnology company, is focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of new drugs to treat cancers in the United States. The company is headquartered in Alameda, California.
overview.Address: 1851 HARBOR BAY PARKWAY, ALAMEDA, CA, UNITED STATES, 94502
